docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ORDERS TO STOP ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE FILED BY PETITIONER CORDOVA, RICHARD AS TO RESPONDENT PACHECO, LENORA

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE) FILED BY PETITIONER CORDOVA, RICHARD AS TO RESPONDENT PACHECO, LENORA HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 204
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY CORDOVA, RICHARD PACHECO, LENORA
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE) (CLETS) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED CORDOVA, RICHARD AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED PACHECO, LENORA
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE), CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2010, GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-18-2010 11:00 AM FOR DEPT 204

calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petitioner: Richard Cordova, in pro per, present.

Respondent: Lenora Pacheco, in pro per, present.

The parties were sworn.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the following protected persons: Richard Cordova and Margaret Cordova, their residence, and their vehicle.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements.

Contact (directly or indirectly), telephone, send messages, mail, or e-mail.

Respondent is to immediately move out from and not return to 243 Morse, San Francisco, CA 94112. The parties were advised to seek a police civil standby for the Respondent to retrieve her personal belongings from the residence.

Respondent cannot own, possess, have, buy or try to buy, receive or try to receive, or in any other way get a gun or firearm and must turn in or sell guns or firearms.

Expires March 18, 2013

*This no contact/stay away order is consistent with case number FDV-10-807596 (Cordova vs. Cordova-Smith).

Order signed in open court.
